raw_source.title: [Beijing/USA-SanJose] FalconTalent——LLM startup business is looking for onsite full time_Data Scientist/Engineering
raw_source.body:
## About
This position is for my company——FalconTalent.
https://www.falcontalent.com/

## Why we hire
We have LLM+Recruiting specific area business, established at USA-San Jose. It's still in the angel round, with a future estimation of 3+ million USD. Our CTO now base in Beijing, China. He has a phD degree of Purdue University with major in LLM area.

## Requirements
Now I am looking for a young talent of 3~8 years' working experience to base Beijing or USA San Jose. (but we dont support VISA)

You must have:
1) data engineering <ETL/data pipeline>
2) BI/data analyst/Data mining related experience
3) A global Vision (because we donnt only do China business)
4) Good English communication
5) Enterpreneurship

For 1) & 2): I know these 2 parts of work are usually seperated in different teams. If you are strong in 1 area but no hands-on experience in the other one, I think it's ok. Trust my taste to talents. I do know how to aprreciate you. Don't be too stupid with the very exact experience.


## What you 'll again
1) CNY 30-40K monthly (can discuss options if you are the very right person)
2) Transfer and join in the LLM area. Perhaps you will join a hot and money-flowing track.(or premature to say)
3) Lead Data team if business goes smoothly

## Work Location
Beijing or USA San Jose,  - Full-time onsite only
## Contact
my wechat ID: ArcoDeTriunfo
**Please donnt say nothing after connecting. I dont need wechat user but I am happy to know friends.
